simple_types.name: Hyperlinks_Provenance
simple_types.code:
type Hyperlinks_Provenance is
  (Default,
   Env_Excluded,
   Env_Known_Good,
   Env_Unknown,
   XTVERSION_Confirmed,
   XTVERSION_Rejected,
   XTVERSION_Unresolved);

simple_types.name: Hyperlinks_Support
simple_types.code: type Hyperlinks_Support is (Unsupported, Likely_Supported, Supported, Unknown);

record_types.name: Hyperlinks_Result

constants.name: DEFAULT_HYPERLINKS_RESULT
constants.code:
DEFAULT_HYPERLINKS_RESULT : constant Hyperlinks_Result :=
  (Support => Unknown, Provenance => Default, Terminal_Version_Known => False);

subprograms.name: Classify_Hyperlinks_Support
subprograms.code:
function Classify_Hyperlinks_Support
  (Env : Termicap.Environment.Environment; Identity : Termicap.Terminal_Id.Terminal_Identity)
   return Hyperlinks_Result

subprograms.name: Refine_With_XTVERSION
subprograms.code:
function Refine_With_XTVERSION
  (Passive : Hyperlinks_Result; XTV : Termicap.XTVERSION.XTVERSION_Result) return Hyperlinks_Result
